name: IBM's OS/2 Warp Server: The Whole is Greater Than the Sum of the Parts
description: Aberdeen Group evaluates IBM's newly released OS/2 Warp Server, arguing it combines the networking strengths of Novell NetWare with the application strengths of Microsoft NT Server plus integrated directory and security services via a DCE-based Directory and Security Server (DSS) add-on. The study contends that OS/2 Warp Server is at least a year ahead of competitors in delivering an integrated, enterprise-wide NOS with objects, distributed directory services, and network security.
